Text.Page:
We're short on everything—supplies, soldiers, patience...

{@LinkCreature:218#1003$$Kardelen} coordinates our supplies with Tulufan.

Go convince him to speed things, would you?

Anaka's a griper, but she's right.

Our next caravan's not due for a while, but they need it more than we do.

Collect extra gear from the others here at Marakeen. Tell them it's on my orders.

Sietch Bidaum is important, and fasting can sharpen the intellect.

{@LinkCreature:218#1004$$Tirian} has some spare herbs in her pack, as well.

Fine.

But if my migraines come back, I'm sending you to reclaim these.

Hmm. Scorpion blood for wounds. Lizard tails—very tasty! Barrel cactus for water and eating.

Take! Take! You and me, one tribe.

I understand. Here's all the cooking oil and grain I can spare.

{@LinkCreature:218#1003$$Kardelen} should bust our quartermaster back to Velika.
This is a lot of gear! So the supply caravan arrived, did it?
